---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-photo">
    <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Nadika Sharma" />
  </div>
  <div class="hero-text">
    <h1>Nadika Sharma</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Economics & Business Analytics · Lawrence University '26</p>
    <p>
      Hi, I'm Nadika! I'm an Economics and Business Analytics major with a minor 
      in Data Science at Lawrence University. I'm passionate about making data 
      feel <strong>less intimidating and more meaningful</strong> — whether that's 
      through clean visualizations, thoughtful analysis, or simply helping others 
      see that data doesn't have to be scary. When I'm not working with data, you 
      can find me in my role as a <strong>Career Peer Educator</strong>, helping 
      fellow students navigate their professional journeys.
    </p>
    <div class="social-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nadikasharma" target="_blank">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/nadikasharma" target="_blank">
        <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
      </a>
      <a href="mailto:sharmanadika@gmail.com">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="home-about">
  <div class="warm-divider"></div>
  <h2>A little more about me</h2>
  <p>
    I grew up in <strong>Kathmandu, Nepal</strong> and have carried a love for 
    exploration — of places, flavors, and cultures ever since. I'm an avid 
    traveler and I love being around the ocean and anything water related. 
    One of my proudest adventures? <strong>Snorkelling and swimming in the Great 
    Barrier Reef in Australia</strong> — an experience I'll never forget.
  </p>
  <p>
    When I'm home, I love <strong>cooking and trying new cuisines</strong>, and 
    there's nothing I enjoy more than hosting friends and family for a good dinner. 
    Food, for me, is another way of bringing people together. I also love to sing — 
    it's my quiet creative outlet away from spreadsheets and datasets.
  </p>
  <p>
    Oh, and here's a fun fact about me — I'm a <strong>leapling</strong> 🐸 
    Born on February 29th, which means I only get to celebrate my actual birthday 
    once every four years!
  </p>
</div>
```
